MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry Dorfman; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lonnie Burton is present.
Attorney Ted Janowsky representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of July 29, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
